_doc: THROWAWAY ground-truth spec (collision-mover wiring): read Arche's body BOX dims once per frame during the freeroam walk — body+0xc width / +0x10 height / +0x14 top-margin (the horizontal mover scans rows [y+0x14, y+h-1]) / +0x20 box idx byte.  Chain identical to freeroam_mover_fields.json arche_body.  RUN: nix develop --command python3 tools/frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/freeroam-walk/trace-nav.jsonl --held-trace runs/freeroam-walk/walk-held.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/arche_box_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --call-trace-frames 4540,4560 --run-dir runs/arche-box/cap.

0x5b8fc0.name: arche_body
0x5b8fc0._note: FUN_005b8fc0 Flip (once/frame). Leader-chain to Arche's body (room_state 0x8a9b50+0x2784 -> +0x200c -> +0x9f4 entity -> +0x40 body).

fields.name: box_m
fields.reason: body+0x14 top margin (horizontal scan starts at y+0x14)

fields.name: box_i
fields.reason: body+0x20 current box idx (byte, read as i32)
